discovery.name: EXISTING_ACTIVE_ASSIGNMENTS
discovery.sql: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=1 THEN c.asg END) AS ASG1, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=1 THEN c.wt END) AS WT1, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=1 THEN c.pn END) AS PN1, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=1 THEN c.le END) AS LE1, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=1 THEN c.ds END) AS DS1, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=2 THEN c.asg END) AS ASG2, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=2 THEN c.wt END) AS WT2, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=2 THEN c.pn END) AS PN2, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=2 THEN c.le END) AS LE2, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=2 THEN c.ds END) AS DS2, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=3 THEN c.asg END) AS ASG3, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=3 THEN c.wt END) AS WT3, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=3 THEN c.pn END) AS PN3, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=3 THEN c.le END) AS LE3, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=3 THEN c.ds END) AS DS3 FROM (SELECT a.assignment_number AS asg, wt.assignment_number AS wt, p.person_number AS pn, le_tl.name AS le, TO_CHAR(pos.date_start,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS ds, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.assignment_id) rn FROM per_all_assignments_m a JOIN per_all_people_f p ON p.person_id = a.person_id AND SYSDATE BETWEEN p.effective_start_date AND p.effective_end_date JOIN pay_pay_relationships_dn pr ON pr.person_id = a.person_id AND pr.legislative_data_group_id = 300000046974970 JOIN per_all_assignments_m wt ON wt.period_of_service_id = a.period_of_service_id AND wt.assignment_type='ET' AND wt.effective_latest_change='Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN wt.effective_start_date AND wt.effective_end_date JOIN per_periods_of_service pos ON pos.period_of_service_id = a.period_of_service_id JOIN hr_organization_units_f_tl le_tl ON le_tl.organization_id = pos.legal_entity_id AND le_tl.language='US' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN le_tl.effective_start_date AND le_tl.effective_end_date WHERE a.effective_latest_change='Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN a.effective_start_date AND a.effective_end_date AND a.assignment_type='E' AND a.primary_flag='Y' AND a.assignment_status_type='ACTIVE' AND REGEXP_LIKE(p.person_number,'^[0-9]+$')) c WHERE c.rn <= 3

verify.bad_error_contains: valid value for the ActionCode field

base_read.sql: SELECT a.assignment_number AS ASG_NUM, MAX(a.assignment_id) AS ASG_ID, MAX(TO_CHAR(a.normal_hours)) AS NHOURS, MAX(TO_CHAR(a.effective_start_date,'YYYY/MM/DD')) AS ESD FROM per_all_assignments_m a WHERE a.assignment_number IN ('${ASG1}','${ASG2}','${ASG3}') AND a.effective_latest_change='Y' AND a.effective_start_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 2 AND a.normal_hours = 37.5 GROUP BY a.assignment_number
